changelog.title: Hook and Caption/Body fields now actually save
changelog.desc: In the content card's Go Analog section, your Hook and Caption/Body text were being written to the wrong place behind the scenes and never showing up again. Fixed, they now save and reload correctly every time.

changelog.title: Generated content no longer disappears after clicking Generate
changelog.desc: Captions, carousels, reels, newsletters, and more were being generated successfully but rendering invisibly until you closed and reopened the card. Fixed, results now show up immediately.

changelog.title: Regenerating content now gives you something different
changelog.desc: Hitting Generate twice in a row on the same card used to risk landing close to your first result. It now knows what it wrote last time and is told to take a different angle.

changelog.title: Star and filter your tasks
changelog.desc: Mark any task as a priority and filter your board down to just starred tasks with one click.

changelog.title: Dashboard redesign
changelog.desc: This Week's Focus, Pick Up Where You Left Off, and On Your Plate now share one consistent, calmer visual style. Pick Up Where You Left Off is no longer a toggle, it's always visible.

changelog.title: Creative Director Mode can now write the full piece
changelog.desc: Beyond Brief Me, Surprise Me, and the Analog Prompt, there's now a direct option to generate the finished draft itself, in any format including Substack articles.

changelog.title: Sign Out is easier to find and safer
changelog.desc: Sign Out now also lives in Settings, and signing out fully resets the app so the next person signing in on the same device never sees your content.

changelog.title: Swipe File renamed to Repurposed File
